summary: SEO verification testing completed after Helmet implementation fix. Critical issue found: Helmet component not applying service-specific meta tags. Homepage title updated correctly, but service pages still show generic titles instead of service-specific SEO tags.

critical_bugs.issue: Helmet component not applying service-specific meta tags - all service pages show generic homepage title 'Kawesh - Building Tomorrow's Software Today' instead of service-specific titles like 'Web Design & Development - Professional Web Design & Development Services | Kawesh'

seo_issues.impact: Search engines will see generic titles instead of service-specific titles, affecting SEO ranking and click-through rates
seo_issues.expected_behavior: Each service page should show service-specific title, description, and social media tags
seo_issues.current_behavior: All service pages show generic homepage meta tags

passed_tests: Homepage title updated to 'Kawesh - Building Tomorrow's Software Today'
Responsive design adapts to mobile viewport
action_item_for_main_agent: CRITICAL: Fix Helmet component implementation in ServiceDetailPage. The react-helmet-async is not applying service-specific meta tags. Service pages show generic homepage title instead of service-specific titles. Need to investigate why Helmet tags are not overriding the base HTML title and meta tags. Check HelmetProvider configuration and ensure Helmet components are properly mounted.
